title: General Clean-up from Trash & Audit and easier way to get to support history.

posts.author: lrgroom (Lisa Groom)
posts.cookedHtml:
There are 3 general items included here:

  1. Create select all options within both Trash and Archive so you don’t have to individually select items to permanently delete or restore. This is more for a clean-up tasks when starting using monday.com.
  2. From Archive - Option to delete from there instead of having to restore and then delete. Again clean-up.
  3. When you go to Contact Us and Select View your support history. Instead of sending an email, have a separate window pop up with your history. Just a time saver.
